llm._comment: provider: g4f (free, uses your subscriptions) | ollama (local). No API key needed for g4f.

tts._comment: edge-tts is free. Voices: en-US-ChristopherNeural, en-US-JennyNeural, en-GB-RyanNeural

visuals._comment: source: pexels (free stock video) | dalle (AI images via g4f). Set the Pexels key inside CashCrab -> Setup -> Save API keys.

twitter._comment: Get client_id from developer.twitter.com -> OAuth 2.0 settings. Then open CashCrab -> Setup -> Connect Twitter / X.

email_template.subject: Quick question about {business_name}
email_template.body:
Hi {business_name},

I help local businesses like yours attract more customers through modern digital marketing.

I noticed a few quick wins that could boost your online visibility. Would you be open to a brief call this week?

Best regards,
{from_name}

---
To stop receiving these emails, reply STOP.
{physical_address}

leads._comment: Set the Google Places key inside CashCrab -> Setup -> Save API keys.
